---
title: "When Do Model Rankings Hold? An IRT Perspective"
author: "Madhavi Sen"
date: "2026-02-25"
categories: [machine learning, IRT, benchmarking]
description: "Exploring whether model rankings generalise across benchmarks using Item Response Theory."
---

<a href="../../index.html" class="back-to-posts">← back to posts</a>

This is my first post.
